caption: A young man with blonde hair, wearing glasses and a dark blue patterned t-shirt, sits in front of a computer monitor and a professional microphone. He is wearing white over-ear headphones and is laughing and smiling throughout the sequence. On the left side of the screen, a circular graphic overlay is visible, featuring a blue center and a radial menu of height options. The text "Height Wheel!" appears at the top of this graphic, with "6"2" displayed prominently below it and a "DEACTIVATE" button further down. In the background, a computer screen shows a window with the number "20" visible. As the sequence progresses, the man's expression shifts from a wide, open-mouthed laugh to a more subdued smile and then a neutral expression, while his head tilts slightly. The graphic overlay and the background equipment remain static across all frames.
